title: Presidents pressure the press during wartime
description:
In one sense, this moment is new. The conflict with Iran is unfolding in a chaotic digital media environment shaped by artificial intelligence, viral imagery, and instantaneous information warfare.
In another sense, it is an old American story.
content: At roughly the same time, Federal Communications Commission chairman Brendan Carr warned that broadcasters airing “fake” war coverage could risk their broadcast licenses. Because the FCC regulates the public airwaves, Carr’s comments were widely inte... [4399 chars]

title: PNP warns against fake AI-generated videos
description: MANILA, Philippines - The Philippine National Police (PNP) on Tuesday reminded the public to be vigilant against artificial intelligence (AI)-generated videos circulating online including police officers being impersonated and other misleading content created to appear real and spread false information.

title: Canada Cyber Startup Tailscale Buys Border0 as AI Agents Spill Onto Servers

title: CommuniGate 2026: Navigating New Media Ecologies in the Digital Era
description: Chandigarh University collaborated with the Indian Council of Social Science Research to host 'CommuniGate 2026', an international conference exploring the transformation of communication paradigms in the digital age. The event offered a platform for interdisciplinary discussions on new media, artificial intelligence, and their implications for society and democracy.
content:

title: IRS Standards on AI and Tax Preparation Would Protect Businesses
description: If the IRS doesn’t issue comprehensive federal guidance on artificial intelligence use in tax preparation, a patchwork of conflicting state rules will undermine business compliance and CPA professionalism.
content: Accounting software companies are promoting AI-powered tools to taxpayers while sidestepping responsibility for errors and passing liability to clients. Last month, I sent a letter to Treasury Secretary and IRS Acting Commissioner Scott Bessent calli... [5311 chars]
